stages.summary_redacted: DEMO_ONLY metadata seed contains RFC 5737 IPs, .test domains, process metadata, and no payloads.
Flow, DNS, and TLS observations are derived from fixture metadata only.
Process and destination context are attached as redacted entity references.
Evidence-backed C2, exfiltration, and lateral movement findings are produced.
Risk events promote findings into alerts and one incident.
A bounded GraphViewModel is built from redacted entities and evidence references.
Recommend-only response options are planned with policy and rollback metadata.
A redacted report and local-only export history record are produced.
